positive: A synthwave-style illustration featuring a neon grid landscape, stylized palm trees, and a setting sun over a reflective ocean. Use a vibrant palette of magenta, cyan, and electric blue. Retro-futurism, 80s vaporwave aesthetic, vector art, highly geometric.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, sketch, watercolor
